title: otiophora calycophylla subsp. calycophylla
intro: Otiophora calycophylla subsp. calycophylla is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the hairy orchid. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Otiophora calycophylla subsp. calycophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
